calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge
Department 206 for Short Cause Trial/Prove Up.
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon,
CSR#6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates LLC.
Arash Moussavian, Esq., specially appearing for Defendant Katherine Yumul.
Declaration pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-25 dismissed without prejudice.

After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Portfolio
Recovery Associates LLC and against Defendant Katherine Yumul as follows:

Principal $4234.77
Pre-Judgment Interest $0
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $236.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $4470.77

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Set For Trial On Sep-26-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
